metadata.name: Scavenge — Deadbridge Goliath puts 5 counters on a creature
metadata.description: Tests the Scavenge activated ability (CR 702.97a) on Deadbridge Goliath (5/5 Insect, Scavenge {4}{G}{G}). Deadbridge Goliath is in p1's graveyard. Bog Raiders (2/2 Zombie) is on p1's battlefield. During p1's precombat main phase with an empty stack, p1 activates Scavenge by paying {4}{G}{G} and exiling Deadbridge Goliath from the graveyard as part of the cost. Per the 2013-04-15 ruling, exiling the card is part of the activation cost — Deadbridge Goliath moves to exile immediately at activation time, before the ScavengeAbility is placed on the stack. The ScavengeAbility then resolves: 5 +1/+1 counters (equal to Deadbridge Goliath's power of 5, snapshotted before exile per CR 702.97a) are placed on Bog Raiders, making it an effective 7/7. Final state: Deadbridge Goliath is in exile, Bog Raiders is on the battlefield with 5 +1/+1 counters (effective 7/7), and the stack is empty.
metadata.generation_notes: Deadbridge Goliath oracle text: Scavenge {4}{G}{G} ({4}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.) P/T: 5/5. CR 702.97a: The number of +1/+1 counters equals the power of the exiled card. Engine implementation: handle_scavenge_card() in abilities.rs. The harness uses action='scavenge_card' with card='Deadbridge Goliath' (in graveyard) and target_creature='Bog Raiders' (on battlefield). The engine exiles the card as cost (move_object_to_zone to Exile), snapshots power=5 BEFORE exile (Varolz ruling 2013-04-15), then pushes ScavengeAbility onto the stack. After activation: Deadbridge Goliath is in exile (not graveyard), ScavengeAbility is on the stack (count 1). After resolution: Bog Raiders has 5 plus_one_plus_one counters (effective 7/7), stack empty. Sorcery speed enforcement (CR 702.97a): active player only, main phase only, empty stack — all satisfied. Mana cost: {4}{G}{G} = colorless:4, green:2. parse_counter_type supports 'plus_one_plus_one' (confirmed in replay_harness.rs line 1577). The 'permanent.Bog Raiders.counters.plus_one_plus_one' assertion path is supported (confirmed in script 156).

script.step_note: p1 activates Scavenge on Deadbridge Goliath ({4}{G}{G}), exiling it as cost and targeting Bog Raiders. ScavengeAbility goes on the stack. Both players pass — ability resolves: 5 +1/+1 counters placed on Bog Raiders (now effective 7/7).

actions.description: Initial: Deadbridge Goliath in p1 graveyard; Bog Raiders on battlefield (2/2 base); stack empty; p1 has {4}{G}{G} in pool
actions.note: Deadbridge Goliath (5/5 Insect, Scavenge {4}{G}{G}) is in p1's graveyard. Bog Raiders (base 2/2 Zombie, Swampwalk) is on p1's battlefield with no counters. Stack is empty. p1 has colorless:4, green:2 in their mana pool — sufficient to pay the Scavenge cost.

CR 702.97a: p1 activates Scavenge on Deadbridge Goliath from their graveyard. Cost: pay {4}{G}{G} and exile Deadbridge Goliath. Exiling is part of the cost (2013-04-15 ruling) — Deadbridge Goliath is immediately moved to exile at activation time. Power is snapshotted at 5 before exile. ScavengeAbility targeting Bog Raiders is placed on the stack. Sorcery speed enforced: active player (p1), main phase, empty stack — all conditions met (CR 702.97a).

actions.description: After activation: Deadbridge Goliath is in exile (cost paid); ScavengeAbility is on the stack targeting Bog Raiders; Bog Raiders still has no counters
actions.note: CR 702.97a: Exiling Deadbridge Goliath was the cost — it is in exile, no longer in p1's graveyard. The ScavengeAbility (targeting Bog Raiders) is on the stack. Bog Raiders has not yet received any counters.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — ScavengeAbility resolves (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 702.97a: ScavengeAbility resolves. Places a number of +1/+1 counters equal to Deadbridge Goliath's power (5, snapshotted before exile) onto target creature Bog Raiders. Bog Raiders receives 5 +1/+1 counters — effective P/T becomes 7/7 (base 2/2 + 5/5 from counters).

actions.note: CR 608.2: ScavengeAbility resolves. 5 +1/+1 counters placed on Bog Raiders (power of exiled Deadbridge Goliath = 5). Stack is now empty.

actions.description: Final: Deadbridge Goliath in exile; Bog Raiders on battlefield with 5 +1/+1 counters (effective 7/7); stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.97a: Scavenge resolved successfully. Deadbridge Goliath is in exile (exiled as part of the activation cost). Bog Raiders now has 5 +1/+1 counters — effective P/T 7/7 (base 2/2 + 5 counters). Stack is empty. No SBAs triggered (Bog Raiders has positive toughness, life totals unchanged).
